---
title: "Idris2 Base"
---
Singletons are single mutisets.
Pixels are pairs of singletons.
Maxels are multisets of pixels.


## About

### Types

{{< include tests/types.qmd >}}

## Properties

### Ordered Structures

{{< include tests/ordered-structures.qmd >}}

### Graphs

{{< include tests/graphs.qmd >}}

### Equivalence Relations

{{< include tests/equivalence-relations.qmd >}}

### Relations

{{< include tests/relations.qmd >}}

### Tournaments

{{< include tests/tournaments.qmd >}}
